entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop that is an important source of dietary iron and zinc in Africa and India

entities.name: IRON
entities.description: A dietary mineral whose concentration in sorghum grains is being studied

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A dietary mineral whose concentration in sorghum grains is being studied

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where sorghum is an important source of dietary iron and zinc

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country where sorghum is an important source of dietary iron and zinc

entities.name: PARBHANI SHAKTI
entities.description: A genetically biofortified line of sorghum with higher concentrations of iron and zinc

entities.name: M35-1
entities.description: A control line of sorghum used for comparison with the biofortified line

entities.name: HISTOCHEMICAL STAINING
entities.description: A technique used for analysis of minerals at the tissue level

entities.name: NANOSIMS
entities.description: A technique used for analysis of minerals at the cellular level

entities.name: ALEURONE LAYER
entities.description: A tissue in sorghum grains where iron and zinc are concentrated

entities.name: SCUTELLUM
entities.description: A part of the embryo in sorghum grains where iron and zinc are concentrated

entities.name: EMBRYONIC AXIS
entities.description: A part of the embryo in sorghum grains where zinc is concentrated

entities.name: SUB-ALEURONE
entities.description: A region in sorghum grains where hot spots of iron and zinc were found

entities.name: STARCHY ENDOSPERM CELLS
entities.description: Cells in sorghum grains where hot spots of iron and zinc were found

entities.name: PHYTATES
entities.description: Chemical compounds in which iron and zinc are present in sorghum grains

entities.name: PROTEIN MATRIX
entities.description: A cellular component in sorghum grains where low concentrations of iron and zinc were observed
